ai.notes: The form uses Lever's standard application structure with custom fields injected via hidden JSON templates. Multiple-select fields are rendered as checkboxes in the HTML.

fields.question: Which location are you applying for?
How soon are you available to start a new role?
What is your current work authorization status for the country where you plan to be primarily based? Please specify the type of document/visa and its validity
Please select the level that most accurately describes your professional English communication skills (written and verbal)
options: C2 / Native or Bilingual (Total fluency, can lead complex strategic discussions with ease)
C1 / Advanced (Professional fluency, can handle ambiguity and technical jargon)
B2 / Upper Intermediate (Effective operational proficiency, can lead squad-level tasks)
A1 - A2 / Beginner or Elementary (Basic greetings/short phrases)

fields.question: Are you legally authorized to work in the country this job is located?
options: No - I require Visa/Work Permit Support

fields.question: Do you have a minimum of 6 months of experience in a Customer Care role?
Do you actively use AI at work? If yes, describe a specific way you've used AI tools in your work in the last 12 months.
I acknowledge that the salary range for this position is from 18K-24 EUR gross/year, based on experience

This role is offered exclusively as a B2B freelance contract. You will invoice us as an independent contractor. Are you comfortable with this arrangement and able to operate under a freelance/self-employed setup in your country?
